chunks.en: I want to talk about my morning drink.
chunks.ja: 私の朝の飲み物について話したいと思います。

chunks.en: In the morning, I usually drink hot coffee.
chunks.ja: 朝はたいてい温かいコーヒーを飲みます。

chunks.en: I drink it right after I wake up.
chunks.ja: 起きてすぐにそれを飲みます。

chunks.en: I make my coffee in the kitchen.
chunks.ja: 台所でコーヒーを用意します。

chunks.en: I like it hot, not cold.
chunks.ja: 冷たいのではなく温かいのが好きです。

chunks.en: It's easy because I just add hot water.
chunks.ja: お湯を注ぐだけなので簡単です。

chunks.en: After I drink it, I feel awake and calm.
chunks.ja: 飲んだ後は、目が覚めて落ち着いた気分になります。

chunks.en: So coffee is a nice start to my day.
chunks.ja: だからコーヒーは私の一日の良いスタートです。

outline: Point 1: what I drink and when
Point 2: hot coffee, how I make it
Wrap-up: how it helps me start the day

modelTalk.text: I love my morning drink. I always drink coffee first. It's my favorite way to start the day. I wake up early. Then I go to the kitchen. I make my coffee there. I like it hot, not cold. I boil some water first. Then I add the coffee and a little milk. I don't use much sugar. I sit down and hold my cup. It smells really nice. I drink it slowly. After a few minutes, I feel awake. I feel happy and calm too. My morning coffee makes me ready. Then I'm set for a busy day. I can't skip it. It's a small, happy habit.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my morning drink.
chunks.ja: 今日は朝に飲む飲み物について話したいです。

chunks.en: In the morning I drink hot black coffee.
chunks.ja: 朝は温かいブラックコーヒーを飲みます。

chunks.en: I have it in the kitchen right after I wake up.
chunks.ja: 起きてすぐに台所で飲みます。

chunks.en: I make it with hot water and a coffee machine.
chunks.ja: お湯とコーヒーマシンで作ります。

chunks.en: I like it hot, not cold, every day.
chunks.ja: 毎日、冷たいのではなく温かいのが好きです。

chunks.en: After I drink it, I feel awake and happy.
chunks.ja: 飲んだ後は、目が覚めて幸せな気分になります。

chunks.en: So a good coffee helps me start my day.
chunks.ja: だから、おいしいコーヒーは一日を始める助けになります。

outline: What and where I drink it
Hot coffee and how I make it
Wrap-up: how it helps my day

modelTalk.text: I love my mornings. I always drink coffee first. I make it right after I wake up. I go to the kitchen. It's quiet there. I like it hot, not cold. I use a small cup. I add a little milk. Sometimes I put in some sugar. I don't like it too sweet. I hold the warm cup in my hands. It feels nice. I drink it slowly by the window. I look outside for a while. After the coffee, I feel awake. I'm ready for my day now. My head feels clear and happy. It's a small thing, but I love it. That's my morning drink.
